counters.description: this match up is really hard because jayce relies on his knock back to disengage, but mundo can extend trades with his passive and cleavers to catch up to you. it's really hard to run especially when he turns 6, pops ghost, and runs you down if you overextend! try your best to play aggressive early with conq and ignite for early kills before he statchecks, eclipse buildpath

this is another hard one. try your best to zone her from the 3 melees level 1 with your auto attacks, abuse bushes. after that you have to dodge her e to take any fights. if she lands her e on then you should try to disengage but if she misses it, that's your chance to do a short trade with her. watch low hp ranged creeps that she can set up to dash onto you. take conq ignite and win early game eclipse build path

this guy is just a stat check. he will spam q onto you and all in once you're low, no counterplay. most of the time, i take corrupting potion and just let him spam q on me and just farm the best you can. usually, they focus on poking rather than farming so you can just get a huge cs lead and try to win off of that. could cheese with nullifying orb, but not necessary. take conq, tp, and go goredrinker build path

any champion with dashes is jayces worst enemy this champion has too much to counter you. invis q dash backwards and dashes on her r. so its alot to work against it but its possible to kill her just farm for hexdrinker and just try your best not to int early and you can out scale her. take conq, tp and both build paths work fine

this champion can be very annoying even if you take conq you lose level 1 due to his passive and his q so try to do small trades with him as much as possible, try to do the trade when he waste his dash onto the creeps to last hit and be careful level 6 he will 100 to 0 you if you waste your phase rush so just keep in mind if he has ult keep phase rush up at all times!

this match up is hard since you cant abuse him early if you try to auto him early he can just q you and proc press to attack, so i always try to wait till level 3 or 4 and do small trades yet again. thats the hardest thing to do just wait till he waste abilities on the creep wave and just going even in this lane is winning remember that.

this match up is kinda annoying because his q does more damage than your q which is kinda a joke so what i do is tend to stay away from creep wave and he waste his q on you he gonna miss creeps so get a cs lead and try to press your advantage. do your best to do trades when he waste his w"brittle skill" so hes not unstoppable and you can punish him. take conq tp and both build paths work

sion can be annoying if he goes full ad its free but if he goes tank its annoying as hell. try to harras early and make sure if you get stuck into a pinch when he trys to q you use your e to cancel it and knock him away, go conq cutdown!!. tp with eclipse build path
brrooo i swear to gods this match is so hard now because of riven buff be careful respect her and take short trades now, phase rush, tp and eclipse build path

holy moly this match up is aids. you have to wait till you see him w twice before trading.  that's the best way to win the lane but good rengars don't do that often. basically, you have to play passive and avoid inting early. the lane goes into your favor as long as you don't die early, should be able to outscale from mythic + beyond. conq ignite, goredrinker build path

oh lord let me tell you this this is hell. once he hits 6 and sheen, you will not win all ins, regardless of stacks. you should just die if you're past halfway in the lane without abilities. try your best to bait out his ult and just phase rush out to take as little damage as possible. phase rush tp and eclipse hope jg doesnt weakside you (can abuse early lvl 1-4 and set up a dive)

complete rng gods hate jayce. this match up is annoying he can heal for free non stop and he can kill you level 2 so be careful anytime trnda tries to spin onto you try your best to knock him away to cancel the damage and his gap close. conq ignite eclipse fight early snowball
this match up is all about not getting hit in the middle of his w. try your best to do quick trades and run away. dont get stunned by his e and take that true damage to the face you will insta lose.

gp is a monster early game!! do not try to trade with him early till you hit level 3 or 4 just try your best to not take free gasp procs off his q and just be careful taking early damage you do outscale him at 1 item so just wait for it. conq ignite , eclipse

this guy is a monster after 6. avoid getting hit by his e and if he walls you, try to q onto the creeps to get out of it quickly.  ghouls will mess you up badly and he statchecks unless you abuse early, not a fun lane. phaserush tp goredrinker.

this is a tough match up but you have to mack sure you click on to see how many turrets he has it will show on his picture so what you try to do is clear them all out and all in him when you cant place any towers downs . hard to clear towers just farm get hexdrinker and start to land poke.
